title: gentiana borneensis subsp. borneensis
intro: Gentiana borneensis subsp. borneensis, also known as Borneo gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and unique growth habits. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever. The health benefits of Borneo gentian include its ability to soothe coughs, clear mucus from the lungs, and protect against infections, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
